kinesisanalytics.application.inputparall: Describes the number of in-application streams to create for a given streaming source. For information about parallelism, see [Configuring Application Input](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/dev/how-it-works-input.html).

kinesisanalytics.application.inputparall.Description: Number of in-application streams to create. For more information, see [Limits](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/dev/limits.html).
